results.rendered_html:
rocanā
1 The bright sky, firmament.
2 A handsome woman.
3 A kind of yellow pigment (= gorocanā q. v.);  R. 6. 65 , 17. 24 ;  Śi. 11. 51. 
4 A red lotus-flower.
5 Dark Śālmali.
